scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/oxlint-config build && bun run --cwd packages/ts-mcp build && bun run --cwd packages/eslint-plugin-zachs-rules build
scripts.check: bun run agent-rules:sync && bun run format:check && bun run lint:eslint && bun run --cwd packages/oxlint-config check && bun run --cwd packages/ts-mcp check && bun run --cwd packages/eslint-plugin-zachs-rules check
scripts.lint: bun run lint:oxlint && bun run lint:eslint
scripts.lint:fix: bun run --cwd packages/ts-mcp lint:fix && bun run --cwd packages/eslint-plugin-zachs-rules lint:fix && eslint . --fix
scripts.lint:oxlint: bun run --cwd packages/ts-mcp lint && bun run --cwd packages/eslint-plugin-zachs-rules lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/ts-mcp typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/eslint-plugin-zachs-rules typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/ts-mcp test && bun run --cwd packages/eslint-plugin-zachs-rules test
